prompt: An old Provencal doorway — a weathered aged wooden door set into a warm textured stone-and-plaster wall, slightly off-centre, lived-in and quiet. Empty scene, absolutely NO people, no figures, no mannequins. Soft, even, diffuse open-shade daylight — no harsh sun, no hard cast shadows, gentle flat natural light. Worn stone/terracotta paving across the lower third as a clear ground plane, receding gently. Generous empty standing space in the centre for a person to be added later. Photographic, medium-format film look, fine natural grain, muted warm-neutral color, calm editorial slow-fashion mood, realistic — never illustration or CGI. Vertical 2:3 framing.
